CONT. ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-21-2003 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Jan-13-04 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Michael Tzheng, Esq., appearing for defendant and specially appearing for plaintiff. Case has settled. The OSC is re-set to 1/13/2004 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212. Court granted defendant's request to set aside sanctions issued to defendant's counsel only. Court instructed counsel to submit a proposed order for the court's signature. Proceedings reported by: Gena Eales, CSR 176. (212)

ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-19-2003 Continued To Nov-20-03 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Each counsel is sanctioned $250.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 12/18/2003 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by LaVon Granger. (212)
